description: You are a Maintenance Technician at a data center. Following a recent power outage, the facility manager realized that the electrical distribution topology is not documented in the CMMS, making troubleshooting difficult. Log in to OpenMaint (admin/admin) and create dependency relationships between six pre-existing electrical assets (Transformer, Switchgear, Panels, ATS, UPS) to reflect the actual power feed hierarchy. The specific equipment relationships are described in 'power_topology.txt' located on the desktop. Use any available CI-to-CI relation type to document these connections.
